rulings.Case Title: JOHN M SILVA VS. GENERAL ELECTRIC COMPANY
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Granting Leave To File First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, September 16, 2015 in Department 503, Line 1. Plaintiff's motion for leave to file first amended complaint is continued on the court's own motion to September 17, 2015. = (503/TLJ)
